content.verdict: Family-owned by Crown Group and set in Baa Atoll UNESCO Biosphere Reserve, Vakkaru offers 125 villas across beach and overwater categories with warm Maldivian service. The overwater Onu Onu spa, the lush jungle island, and the fair pricing put it on honeymoon shortlists for couples who want luxury without the Randheli-level bill.
content.best_room: The Overwater Pool Villa — infinity pool, direct lagoon access, spacious sundeck. The Beach Pool Villa is equally romantic with a private garden shaded by palms.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Seaplane Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 30-minute seaplane from Malé. Coconut welcome, villa orientation, sunset on your deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: House Reef Snorkel
itinerary_7_nights.description: Guided morning snorkel — Vakkaru's reef is a highlight — followed by poolside lunch and a couples Onu Onu spa ritual.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Hanifaru Bay Manta Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Trip to UNESCO Hanifaru Bay (May–Nov) for mantas, lobster lunch at Onu Beach Club, sunset cocktail at The Bar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa & Dhoni Cruise
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning yoga in the overwater pavilion, afternoon dhoni cruise with dolphin spotting, dinner at Italian restaurant Amaany.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Sandbank Picnic
itinerary_7_nights.description: Boat drop-off at private sandbank with gourmet picnic and Champagne, sunset back at the resort with beach bonfire.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Dive or Pamper
itinerary_7_nights.description: Two-tank dive trip or a lazy day in the pool. Evening degustation dinner at Over The Waves seafood restaurant.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Floating breakfast, final reef swim, seaplane back to Malé.

caveats: Larger villa count means slightly less intimate than boutique peers
Some beach villas have partial privacy due to bush density

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — strong value, lush island, excellent reef, and warm Maldivian service.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: May–November for mantas; December–April for calm, dry weather.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 3–5 months ahead; frequent honeymoon packages available.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No — family-friendly with a kids club, but overwater villas are adult-focused and private.
